title: Whimscape X Easy Anvils
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack that makes Easy Anvils compatible with Whimscape!
body:
- Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) for his resource pack Whimscape

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab30d3739908c7958f04d056f509c2482950f73.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)


This pack retextures the Name Tag GUI of the [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) mod to fit it to [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

<details>
<summary>Preview</summary>
